title: bidens amplectens
intro: Bidens amplectens, also known as Embracing Beggar's Lice, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its small white flowers and distinctive, clasping leaves. Traditionally, Bidens amplectens has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving rheumatism, and soothing skin irritations, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Bidens amplectens is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
